description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on every pull request opened, synchronized, or reopened. Use a matrix strategy to build on multiple operating systems (ubuntu-22.04, windows-latest, macos-13, macos-15) in parallel, failing fast disabled. For each OS, check out the repository, set up Node.js 18.12.1, install OS-specific dependencies if needed, install project dependencies with npm install, build nodegui with npm run build, run tests with npm run test, and execute linters for C++ and TypeScript code.
